posts.author: StitchAndMend_UK
posts.text: Just managed to fix a tear on my favourite denim jacket with some patchwork! Sewing is such a satisfying hobby, love getting creative with old clothes. #Sewing #DIY
posts.explanation: This post is approved as it shares a harmless personal hobby update without any policy violations.

posts.author: JemmaK_84
posts.text: Has anyone else noticed the bins on our street are all being collected at different times? It's getting really confusing, I've been waiting for my recycling bin for three days now! #Bins
posts.explanation: This is a harmless observation about local services that does not violate any policies.

posts.author: SarahJ_Recycling
posts.text: Just received a friendly reminder from the council that our street will be getting new wheelie bins next month. It's going to make a big difference to how we manage waste at home! #CommunityUpdate
posts.explanation: This is a standard public information notice about facility maintenance and does not violate any policy.

posts.author: SunnyGarden42
posts.text: Just managed to organise our little charity fun day next week! There will be raffles, games and a bouncy castle in the park. It's going to be such a lovely community event with lots of families joining in. #CommunityEvent #FunDay
posts.explanation: This post is harmless promotional content about a local charity fun day and does not violate any policy.

posts.author: TechWatcher92
posts.text: It feels like every time I buy clothes, they're made by someone working in terrible conditions just so we can have cheap items. Corporations need to stop replacing workers with AI and actually care about fair wages again.
posts.explanation: The post expresses lawful criticism of corporate practices regarding AI and worker rights, which is permitted opinion.

posts.author: BikeLover_84
posts.text: Spent a long afternoon stripping down my old mountain bike to give it a proper clean and oil job. The chain feels so much smoother now! Can't wait to get back on the trails this weekend.
posts.explanation: This is a personal update about repairing a bicycle, which is allowed under normal policy guidelines.

posts.author: GadgetLover84
posts.text: OMG check out these amazing home gadgets for just £9.99! You can buy a smart vacuum, air purifier and LED lights now! Click the link to order today! #HomeLife #Sale
posts.explanation: This post is spam because it contains obvious commercial promotion and an external link.

posts.author: ArtisticSoul_24
posts.text: Honestly, @CreativeMinds99's latest piece is absolute trash. Looks like a mess and clearly wasted effort.
posts.explanation: This post targets another user with a clear one-off insult about their art, which violates our harassment policy.

posts.author: SecureVerify24
posts.text: URGENT: Please click here to verify your account instantly! We have detected suspicious activity and need you to confirm your identity by entering your card details now. Don't wait or you will lose access! #Urgent #VerifyNow
posts.explanation: This post requests sensitive financial information and uses urgent language typical of obvious fraud, so it must be removed.

posts.author: SarahWellnessHub
posts.text: Everyone needs to know about The Radiant Reset protocol! It's a complete game-changer for cancer treatment. Radiotherapy is outdated and harmful, so please stop it immediately and switch to our powerful herbal supplements instead. My friend was cured using this method! #HealthFreedom #NaturalCure #RadiantReset
posts.explanation: This post promotes abandoning radiotherapy for unproven supplements, which constitutes harmful medical misinformation.

posts.author: LilyCleanses_UK
posts.text: My journey to a healthier life started with The Pure Balance Method! They say that starving yourself for 24 hours is essential to reset your system and burn off all the bad toxins. I just did it and feel so much lighter now, ready to start my new diet! #HealthJourney
posts.explanation: This post promotes dangerous eating-disorder behaviour by encouraging starvation as a health reset.

posts.author: SplashKing_84
posts.text: Check out this insane water stunt I'm going to pull off! Jumping from a diving board into a kiddie pool is the ultimate way to get a massive splash. It's so dangerous but totally worth it for the adrenaline rush! #Adrenaline #StuntLife
posts.explanation: This post promotes a dangerous stunt involving jumping from a height into shallow water, which carries a high risk of serious injury.

posts.author: LunaRose_24
posts.text: I'm not joking anyone. I'm going to burn down The Oakwood Community Centre tonight at 9pm because they won't listen to my demands. I have the match and I'm coming for it. #Threat #Urgent
posts.explanation: This post describes a credible threat of violence with a specific target and time, requiring specialist investigation.

posts.author: SarahJenkins_84
posts.text: I found a neighbour's dog, Buster, left chained in a kennel behind their shed for about 24 hours yesterday. He was completely starving and had no water. The owner is refusing to feed him again and said they don't care if he starves. I've reported this but the situation feels very serious and needs immediate intervention.
posts.explanation: This post reports serious animal neglect requiring specialist intervention under ThreatViolence.

posts.author: SadSoul_84
posts.text: I'm so sorry, I can't talk right now. The pain is too much and I'm not sure how to handle it tonight. Please don't leave me.
posts.explanation: This post indicates a personal crisis with self-harm risk requiring immediate specialist intervention.

posts.author: Liam_TheWanderer84
posts.text: I'm struggling so hard right now and feel like there's no point anymore. The silence in my room is getting too loud, I can't take it much longer. Please don't let me go alone.
posts.explanation: This post indicates a personal crisis with signs of potential self-harm, requiring specialist review to assess immediate risk and support needs.

posts.author: Maddie_Stone92
posts.text: I've been trying to reach my friend Alex for days, but every time I try to DM them, their messages get replaced with weird threats from accounts that look like theirs. First it was 'Alex_Daily', then 'A_Stone_Official'. It's getting scary because they keep saying the same creepy stuff about me. #Harassment
posts.explanation: This case requires specialist investigation as the user is being targeted by replacement accounts used for persistent harassment.

posts.author: Sarah_M._Jones
posts.text: Stop spreading this nonsense about Sarah and her kids! She's been posting lies about our family for weeks and I'm tired of it. Everyone needs to call her out on her disgusting behaviour right now. #Outrage
posts.explanation: The post contains a coordinated pile-on directing repeated abuse against a specific individual, which requires specialist investigation.

posts.author: Jules_Webb
posts.text: Has anyone else tried the new dropshipping deals on this marketplace? I just ordered a designer handbag for my birthday and was asked to pay an extra £45 'processing fee' via crypto. The seller says it's standard now. #Dropship #Deal
posts.explanation: This is suspicious because genuine retailers do not typically request immediate payment for processing fees via cryptocurrency or obscure channels, which indicates a potential scam.

posts.author: HopefulHearts_UK
posts.text: Has anyone received this message from @ReliefFund_92? They claim to be collecting donations for flood victims and say all money goes straight to the bank account provided in the bio. I'm worried it might be a scam but need to help.
posts.explanation: The post indicates a potential fraudulent impersonation of a relief fund requesting financial contributions, which requires specialist investigation to verify authenticity and prevent harm.

posts.author: Mara_Street
posts.text: Anyone know how to remove my profile picture? I posted it earlier and now people are using my full name in their replies even though I changed my username. It's really annoying having strangers address me by my real identity when I'm trying to stay private.
posts.explanation: This post contains exposed sensitive identity information (full name) that requires specialist investigation under the PrivacySensitiveInfo policy.

posts.author: Mara_Stone
posts.text: Just stumbled across this and it's giving me major creeps! Someone shared a map link in their bio that shows exactly where they live and then another post listing their whole daily routine - wake up time, commute, work address, even when they get home. They're posting from the same location every day. This feels like stalking or doxxing to me. Is this normal sharing behaviour? #Privacy
posts.explanation: This post reports the exposure of another person's private live location and daily routine, which falls under PrivacySensitiveInfo.

posts.author: ConcernedCitizen_James
posts.text: URGENT: Just got word from 'Health Watch UK' that water in [Town Name] is contaminated with toxic chemicals! They're saying it's a government cover-up and the supply lines are being sabotaged. Please don't drink tap water until further notice. This could be life threatening for everyone. #WaterCrisis #PublicSafety
posts.explanation: This post promotes an unverified contamination warning that lacks evidence and could cause unnecessary panic among residents.

posts.author: SarahJ_Wellness
posts.text: I found this incredible new treatment for menopause! It's a natural protocol called 'The Radiant Reset' that claims to balance hormones in just 48 hours. I've already lost weight and feel so much better without any medication or side effects. My doctor said it was amazing but I think they're hiding the real cure! #Wellness #NaturalCure
posts.explanation: This post promotes an unverified health treatment with rapid medical claims that could lead to harmful misinformation.

posts.author: CivicVoice_UK
posts.text: Breaking: Just heard from a reliable source that tonight's Town Hall meeting will be cancelled due to 'security concerns' and the new rules are being imposed by an anonymous committee. They say it's for our own safety but no details have been released yet. Don't bother showing up! #TownHall #News
posts.explanation: This post claims a civic event is cancelled and rules are being imposed by an anonymous committee, which could mislead the public about official proceedings and constitutes MisinformationPublicHarm.
